name: laudasist
description: Your Worship Assistant - An app to help churches and worship leaders manage worship services

scripts.test: mkdir -p test-output && npm run test --workspaces --if-present 2>&1 | tee test-output/unit-tests.log
scripts.test:e2e: mkdir -p test-output && npm run test:e2e -w web -- --project=public --project=authenticated 2>&1 | tee test-output/e2e-tests.log
scripts.test:e2e:setup: mkdir -p test-output/.auth && npm run test:e2e:setup -w web
